creator: drs-freebsd@sieborger.nom.za
text:
Revision 334818 removed the lines in mail/mailman/distinfo for the mailman/indexing-2.1.12-0.1.patch.gz and mailman/htdig-2.1.12-0.1.patch.gz distfiles.  Those are needed for the HTDIG option, and without them, the port won't build when one has HTDIG enabled.

I've run 'make makesum', and the port does compile now.
